---
title: "Publications | Zhang Lab | University of Kentucky"
output:
  html_document:
    includes:
      in_header:
        - includes/site-head.html
        - includes/head/publications.html
---

<section class="page-hero" aria-labelledby="publications-title">
<div class="site-shell narrow-copy">
<p class="eyebrow">Publications</p>
<h1 id="publications-title">Research outputs from the Lab.</h1>
</div>
</section>

<section class="section" aria-labelledby="publication-record">
<div class="site-shell publication-layout">
<div class="section-heading">
<p class="eyebrow">Publication record</p>
<h2 id="publication-record">Publications</h2>
</div>
<div class="publication-timeline">
<section class="publication-year-group" aria-labelledby="publications-2026">
<h3 id="publications-2026">2026</h3>
<ol class="publication-list">
<li>
<p class="publication-entry">Zhang, X. D., Cornelius, J. C., Saraswat, S., &amp; Fisher, S. (2026). 2697-LB: AI-based clustering of hypoglycemic clamp responses identifies awareness status in subjects with type 1 diabetes. <em>Diabetes, 75</em>(Supplement 1), 2697-LB.</p>
<a class="publication-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.2337/db26-2697-LB" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="View DOI for AI-based clustering of hypoglycemic clamp responses">View DOI <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span></a>
</li>
<li>
<p class="publication-entry">Saraswat, S., Nurrahma, B. A., Kern, P. A., Nikolajczyk, B. S., &amp; Zhang, X. D. (2026). CytokineProfile: An integrated web tool for cytokine profiling analysis. <em>Computational and Structural Biotechnology Journal, 35</em>(1), 0079.</p>
<a class="publication-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.34133/csbj.0079" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="View DOI for CytokineProfile">View DOI <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span></a>
</li>
<li>
<p class="publication-entry">Miller, C. S., Yan, Q., Kirakodu, S. S., Ebersole, J. L., &amp; Zhang, X. D. (2026). Salivary biomarker panel that identifies periodontitis in persons with type 2 diabetes: A secondary analysis of a cross-sectional study. <em>Journal of Clinical Periodontology, 53</em>(2), 190–200.</p>
<a class="publication-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1111/jcpe.70049" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="View DOI for Salivary biomarker panel">View DOI <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span></a>
</li>
<li>
<p class="publication-entry">Sewell, K. M., Oriakhi, K., Tenlep, S. Y. N., Weaver, M., Bawa, M. S., Park, S.-H., Saraswat, S., Zhang, X. D., Helsley, R. N., Softic, S., et al. (2026). A ubiquitous organophosphate flame retardant disrupts energy and glucose homeostasis in mice. <em>Ecotoxicology and Environmental Safety, 310</em>, 119827.</p>
<a class="publication-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ecoenv.2026.119827" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="View DOI for A ubiquitous organophosphate flame retardant">View DOI <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span></a>
</li>
</ol>
</section>

<section class="publication-year-group" aria-labelledby="publications-2025">
<h3 id="publications-2025">2025</h3>
<ol class="publication-list">
<li>
<p class="publication-entry">Saraswat, S., Kern, P. A., Kalantar, G., Nikolajczyk, B., &amp; Zhang, X. D. (2025). 57-PUB: CytoProfile—advancing cytokine profiling analysis with R. <em>Diabetes, 74</em>(Supplement 1), 57-PUB.</p>
<a class="publication-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.2337/db25-57-PUB" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="View DOI for CytoProfile advancing cytokine profiling analysis with R">View DOI <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span></a>
</li>
<li>
<p class="publication-entry">SantaCruz-Calvo, S., Saraswat, S., Kalantar, G. H., Zukowski, E., Marszalkowski, H., Javidan, A., Gholamrezaeinejad, F., Bharath, L. P., Kern, P. A., Zhang, X. D., et al. (2025). A unique inflammaging profile generated by T cells from people with obesity is metformin resistant. <em>GeroScience, 47</em>(3), 3725–3739.</p>
<a class="publication-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s11357-024-01441-4" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="View DOI for A unique inflammaging profile">View DOI <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span></a>
</li>
<li>
<p class="publication-entry">Zhan, D., Fisher, S. J., &amp; Zhang, X. D. (2025). 233-OR: Occurrence and impact of missing data on CGM metrics—analysis of data from Type 1 Diabetes Exercise Initiative (T1DEXI). <em>Diabetes, 74</em>(Supplement 1), 233-OR.</p>
<a class="publication-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.2337/db25-233-OR" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="View DOI for Occurrence and impact of missing data on CGM metrics">View DOI <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span></a>
</li>
</ol>
</section>

<section class="publication-year-group" aria-labelledby="publications-2024">
<h3 id="publications-2024">2024</h3>
<ol class="publication-list">
<li>
<p class="publication-entry">SantaCruz-Calvo, S., Saraswat, S., Hasturk, H., Dawson, D. R., Zhang, X. D., &amp; Nikolajczyk, B. S. (2024). Periodontitis and diabetes differentially affect inflammation in obesity. <em>Journal of Dental Research, 103</em>(12), 1313–1322.</p>
<a class="publication-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1177/00220345241280743" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="View DOI for Periodontitis and diabetes differentially affect inflammation in obesity">View DOI <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span></a>
</li>
<li>
<p class="publication-entry">Yan, Q., Miller, C. S., Ebersole, J., &amp; Zhang, X. D. (2024). Advancing salivary biomarker development machine learning. <em>Annals of Epidemiology, 97</em>, 124.</p>
<a class="publication-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.annepidem.2024.07.031" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="View DOI for Advancing salivary biomarker development machine learning">View DOI <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span></a>
</li>
<li>
<p class="publication-entry">Saraswat, S., SantaCruz Calvo, S., Kern, P. A., Nikolajczyk, B., &amp; Zhang, X. D. (2024). 1698-P: Partial least squares discrimination analysis of cytokine profiles in T cells with inflammation in subjects with obesity. <em>Diabetes, 73</em>(Supplement 1), 1698-P.</p>
<a class="publication-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.2337/db24-1698-P" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="View DOI for Partial least squares discrimination analysis">View DOI <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span></a>
</li>
<li>
<p class="publication-entry">Phan, C., Fisher, S. J., &amp; Zhang, X. D. (2024). 603-P: In type 1 diabetes, meta-analysis identifies variable glucose response to exercise based on intensity. <em>Diabetes, 73</em>(Supplement 1), 603-P.</p>
<a class="publication-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.2337/db24-603-P" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="View DOI for Meta-analysis identifies variable glucose response to exercise">View DOI <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span></a>
</li>
<li>
<p class="publication-entry">Kalantar, G. H., Saraswat, S., SantaCruz-Calvo, S., Gholamrezaeinejad, F., Javidan, A., Agrawal, M., Liu, R., Kern, P. A., Zhang, X. D., &amp; Nikolajczyk, B. S. (2024). Fasting and glucose metabolism differentially impact peripheral inflammation in human type 2 diabetes. <em>Nutrients, 16</em>(10), 1404.</p>
<a class="publication-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.3390/nu16101404" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="View DOI for Fasting and glucose metabolism differentially impact peripheral inflammation">View DOI <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span></a>
</li>
</ol>
</section>
</div>
</div>
</section>
